message:
fix: use prefix-based routing in unsling and mol status for agent bead lookup

gt unsling, gt hook --clear, and gt mol status used filepath.Join(townRoot,
rigName) to locate agent beads, but updateAgentHookBead (which sets the hook)
uses beads.ResolveHookDir with prefix-based routing from routes.jsonl. When
these resolve to different databases, unsling fails with "issue not found"
despite the agent bead existing.

Fix: use beads.ResolveHookDir consistently in both unsling and molecule status
for agent bead and hooked bead lookups, matching the resolution used when
setting the hook.

Fixes: gt-cwbqy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
